moments.author: Erling Haaland
moments.why: A hilarious visual of Haaland disembarking with a taxidermied raccoon holding a whiskey bottle has gone viral — pure meme fuel among men 25–45.

moments.author: Sam Altman
moments.why: OpenAI CEO’s cryptic three‑word post spurred speculation across tech and AI circles — ambiguity breeds virality among the 25‑45 male demographic.
